label: Mote properties
description: Properties for transient visual effect things (motes), controlling fade timing, motion, scale, and brightness.

motionSpeed.label: Motion speed
motionSpeed.description: Speed of the mote's translational movement in cells per second.

rotationRate.label: Rotation rate
rotationRate.description: Rate of rotation in degrees per second.

fadeInTime.label: Fade in time
fadeInTime.description: Seconds taken to fade from invisible to solidBrightness after spawning.

solidTime.label: Solid time
solidTime.description: Seconds spent at full solidBrightness before fading out.

fadeOutTime.label: Fade out time
fadeOutTime.description: Seconds taken to fade from solidBrightness to invisible before despawning.

scale.label: Scale
scale.description: Initial scale multiplier of the mote graphic.

fadeInBrightness.label: Fade-in brightness
fadeInBrightness.description: Alpha at the start of the fade-in phase.

fadeOutBrightness.label: Fade-out brightness
fadeOutBrightness.description: Alpha at the end of the fade-out phase.

airTimeScale.label: Air time scale
airTimeScale.description: Multiplier applied to overall lifetime, scaled by the local wind speed.

needsMaintenance.label: Needs maintenance
needsMaintenance.description: If true, the mote must be kept alive externally; it will not expire on its own.
